name: design-promax-style-presets
description: Feel/theme presets. Default clean_product = Vault OTP case study. Routing picks surface; style locks quality.

efficient_read.description: Prefer these 3 files for clean_product UI. Only add route App.tsx if shell differs (sidebar/chat/checkout).
efficient_read.merge_rule: If style is clean_product or trust_green or clean_product_compact: start from clean_product_core (3), add at most 1 route-specific App.tsx if surface needs chat/sidebar/table/checkout shell. Skip secondary unless atom missing. Cap 4.

clean_product.label: Clean product (Vault OTP quality)
clean_product.when: Default for product UIs, dapps, vaults, settings tools. Prefer unless campaign landing or dense admin.

primary_color.note: Soft green trust; radial washes ok, no purple AI full-bleed

copy_rules: No contract address footers unless user asked
anti_patterns: Purple full-bleed AI marketing for product apps
Default square buttons when pill CTAs expected
More than one primary filled CTA per card

clean_product_compact.label: Clean product compact (mobile-first)
clean_product_compact.when: Mobile-first, tight screens, hide feature marketing row

trust_green.label: Trust green (finance / security)
trust_green.when: Finance, security, vault, savings, compliance-feeling product
trust_green.notes: Same structure as clean_product; force green primary tokens and security icons (shield, lock, key).

marketing_campaign.label: Marketing campaign
marketing_campaign.when: Landing, pricing, launch — not logged-in product shell
marketing_campaign.notes: Still pill CTAs and solar icons; more vertical sections OK.

dense_admin.label: Dense admin / data
dense_admin.notes: Keep card borders and full-radius CTAs; allow sidebar + denser grids.

chat_soft.label: Chat / AI soft product
chat_soft.when: Chat UIs that should still feel product-clean, not purple marketing
chat_soft.notes: Chat shell + pill send buttons; avoid full marketing heroes.

selection_rules: User says like Vault OTP / those cards / those buttons → clean_product + read case-studies/vault-otp.md
Surface H (wallet_dapp) → clean_product or trust_green only (never marketing_campaign)
Surface A landing → marketing_campaign but keep pill buttons + feature cards
Surface D chat → chat_soft (not random purple landing)
Efficient: clean_product_core 3 files first; +1 route App only if needed; max 4
